title: VeloraOS 1.10.3 - Models Homepage Logo Hotfix
releaseNotes: Fixes the Models card on the VeloraOS homepage so its logo no longer renders as undefined.
Adds a safe fallback icon for unexpected homepage icon values.
Refreshes the frontend asset cache so installed systems load the corrected interface.
Preserves accounts, chats, settings, installed models, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
